english: I am hungry now.

translations.en: I am hungry now.
translations.ja: お腹が空きました。

english: Where is the toilet?

translations.en: Where is the toilet?
translations.ja: トイレはどこですか？

english: Stop the bus please.

translations.en: Stop the bus please.
translations.ja: バスを止めてください。

english: Open the heavy gate.

translations.en: Open the heavy gate.
translations.ja: 重い門を開けてください。

english: I need some water.

translations.en: I need some water.
translations.ja: お水が必要です。

english: Where is my mom?

translations.en: Where is my mom?
translations.ja: お母さんはどこ？

english: Call for help now.

translations.en: Call for help now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ助けを呼んで。

english: I am very thirsty.

translations.en: I am very thirsty.
translations.ja: とても喉が渇いています。

english: Show me the map.

translations.en: Show me the map.
translations.ja: 地図を見せてください。

english: Wait for me here.

translations.en: Wait for me here.
translations.ja: ここで待っていて。

english: Look at the moon.

translations.en: Look at the moon.
translations.ja: 月を見て。

english: It is very cold.

translations.en: It is very cold.
translations.ja: とても寒いです。

english: Give me the key.

translations.en: Give me the key.
translations.ja: 鍵をください。

english: See you later today.

translations.en: See you later today.
translations.ja: また後でね。

english: I am lost now.

translations.en: I am lost now.
translations.ja: 道に迷いました。

english: Where is the exit?

translations.en: Where is the exit?
translations.ja: 出口はどこですか？

english: Close the small window.

translations.en: Close the small window.
translations.ja: 小さな窓を閉めて。

english: I have no money.

translations.en: I have no money.
translations.ja: お金を持っていません。

english: Wash your hands well.

translations.en: Wash your hands well.
translations.ja: 手をよく洗って。

english: Time to go now.

translations.en: Time to go now.
translations.ja: 行く時間です。

english: Help me please today.

translations.en: Help me please today.
translations.ja: 今日、助けてください。

english: Where is the hotel?

translations.en: Where is the hotel?
translations.ja: ホテルはどこですか？

english: It is a sunny day.

translations.en: It is a sunny day.
translations.ja: 今日は晴れの日です。

english: I like this bread.

translations.en: I like this bread.
translations.ja: このパンが好きです。

english: Good morning to you.

translations.en: Good morning to you.
translations.ja: おはようございます。

english: I like to play soccer.

translations.en: I like to play soccer.
translations.ja: サッカーをするのが好きです。

english: Will you play with me?

translations.en: Will you play with me?
translations.ja: 私と一緒に遊びますか？

english: I feel very happy today.

translations.en: I feel very happy today.
translations.ja: 今日はとても幸せな気分です。

english: What is your favorite fruit?

translations.en: What is your favorite fruit?
translations.ja: 一番好きな果物は何ですか？

english: I want to eat cake.

translations.en: I want to eat cake.
translations.ja: ケーキを食べたいです。

english: Tell me about your dog.

translations.en: Tell me about your dog.
translations.ja: あなたの犬について教えて。

english: Do you like this music?

translations.en: Do you like this music?
translations.ja: この音楽は好きですか？

english: I am sorry for that.

translations.en: I am sorry for that.
translations.ja: それについてはごめんなさい。

english: Can you help me please?

translations.en: Can you help me please?
translations.ja: 助けていただけますか？

english: Let us draw a flower.

translations.en: Let us draw a flower.
translations.ja: 花を描きましょう。

english: I want to read stories.

translations.en: I want to read stories.
translations.ja: お話を読みたいです。

english: My favorite color is red.

translations.en: My favorite color is red.
translations.ja: 一番好きな色は赤です。

english: How do you feel now?

translations.en: How do you feel now?
translations.ja: 今はどんな気分ですか？

english: I like your new shirt.

translations.en: I like your new shirt.
translations.ja: あなたの新しいシャツがいいね。

english: What are you doing today?

translations.en: What are you doing today?
translations.ja: 今日は何をしていますか？

english: Please speak a bit louder.

translations.en: Please speak a bit louder.
translations.ja: もう少し大きな声で話して。

english: I want to go outside.

translations.en: I want to go outside.
translations.ja: 外に行きたいです。

english: Do you have any pets?

translations.en: Do you have any pets?
translations.ja: ペットは飼っていますか？

english: Look at that big plane.

translations.en: Look at that big plane.
translations.ja: あの大きな飛行機を見て。

english: I like to sing songs.

translations.en: I like to sing songs.
translations.ja: 歌を歌うのが好きです。

english: Is this your blue bag?

translations.en: Is this your blue bag?
translations.ja: これはあなたの青いバッグ？

english: See you at the school.

translations.en: See you at the school.
translations.ja: 学校で会いましょう。

english: I want some orange juice.

translations.en: I want some orange juice.
translations.ja: オレンジジュースが欲しいです。

english: Let us have lunch together.

translations.en: Let us have lunch together.
translations.ja: 一緒に昼食を食べましょう。

english: Can I use your pen?

translations.en: Can I use your pen?
translations.ja: ペンを借りてもいい？

english: The museum opens at ten thirty.

translations.en: The museum opens at ten thirty.
translations.ja: 博物館は10時半に開きます。

english: My father works at the office.

translations.en: My father works at the office.
translations.ja: 父はオフィスで働いています。

english: They go to school by bus.

translations.en: They go to school by bus.
translations.ja: 彼らはバスで学校に行きます。

english: The police officer is very kind.

translations.en: The police officer is very kind.
translations.ja: その警察官はとても親切です。

english: We must follow the safety rules.

translations.en: We must follow the safety rules.
translations.ja: 安全規則に従わなければなりません。

english: The local library is very quiet.

translations.en: The local library is very quiet.
translations.ja: 地元の図書館はとても静かです。

english: He drives a small white truck.

translations.en: He drives a small white truck.
translations.ja: 彼は小さな白いトラックを運転します。

english: The hospital is near the station.

translations.en: The hospital is near the station.
translations.ja: 病院は駅の近くにあります。

english: Many people visit the city park.

translations.en: Many people visit the city park.
translations.ja: 多くの人が市営公園を訪れます。

english: I study at the local school.

translations.en: I study at the local school.
translations.ja: 私は地元の学校で勉強しています。

english: She helps the old lady there.

translations.en: She helps the old lady there.
translations.ja: 彼女はそこにいるお年寄りを助けます。

english: The restaurant has very good soup.

translations.en: The restaurant has very good soup.
translations.ja: そのレストランはとても美味しいスープがあります。

english: The store is near the bank.

translations.en: The store is near the bank.
translations.ja: その店は銀行の近くにあります。

english: We have a party on Sunday.

translations.en: We have a party on Sunday.
translations.ja: 日曜日にパーティーを開きます。

english: He is a famous soccer player.

translations.en: He is a famous soccer player.
translations.ja: 彼は有名なサッカー選手です。

english: The city has a large stadium.

translations.en: The city has a large stadium.
translations.ja: その都市には大きなスタジアムがあります。

english: I like the local spring festival.

translations.en: I like the local spring festival.
translations.ja: 地元の春祭りが好きです。

english: They work together every single day.

translations.en: They work together every single day.
translations.ja: 彼らは毎日一緒に働いています。

english: The police station is very far.

translations.en: The police station is very far.
translations.ja: 警察署はとても遠いです。

english: We save water at home daily.

translations.en: We save water at home daily.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎日家で節水しています。

english: She buys food at the market.

translations.en: She buys food at the market.
translations.ja: 彼女は市場で食べ物を買います。

english: The street is very busy today.

translations.en: The street is very busy today.
translations.ja: 今日は通りがとても賑やかです。

english: I visit my uncle in summer.

translations.en: I visit my uncle in summer.
translations.ja: 夏に叔父を訪ねます。

english: We share the same small room.

translations.en: We share the same small room.
translations.ja: 私たちは同じ小さな部屋を共有しています。

english: The post office closes at five.

translations.en: The post office closes at five.
translations.ja: 郵便局は5時に閉まります。

english: It is essential to respect every different culture in the world today.

translations.en: It is essential to respect every different culture in the world today.
translations.ja: 今日の社会において、異なる文化を尊重することは不可欠です。

english: Comparing these two plans helps us make a better decision for our future.

translations.en: Comparing these two plans helps us make a better decision for our future.
translations.ja: これら2つの計画を比較することで、より良い将来の決断を下せます。

english: True happiness often comes from very simple things in our daily lives.

translations.en: True happiness often comes from very simple things in our daily lives.
translations.ja: 真の幸せは、日々の生活の中の単純なことから生まれることが多いです。

english: Technology makes it much easier to communicate with people across the whole world.

translations.en: Technology makes it much easier to communicate with people across the whole world.
translations.ja: テクノロジーによって、世界中の人々とコミュニケーションをとるのが非常に容易になります。

english: Experience is always a very great teacher for everyone in their lives.

translations.en: Experience is always a very great teacher for everyone in their lives.
translations.ja: 経験は、人生におけるすべての人にとって常に優れた教師です。

english: We must think about how our choices affect the natural world.

translations.en: We must think about how our choices affect the natural world.
translations.ja: 私たちの選択が自然界にどのような影響を与えるか考えなければなりません。

english: Education is the key to creating a much better future for children.

translations.en: Education is the key to creating a much better future for children.
translations.ja: 教育は、子供たちのために、より良い未来を創造するための鍵です。

english: I would appreciate it if you could explain this special point clearly.

translations.en: I would appreciate it if you could explain this special point clearly.
translations.ja: この特別な点について、はっきりと説明していただけると幸いです。

english: Success often comes to those who never give up on their goals.

translations.en: Success often comes to those who never give up on their goals.
translations.ja: 成功は、目標を決してあきらめない人たちにしばしば訪れます。

english: It is important to communicate effectively with all your team members.

translations.en: It is important to communicate effectively with all your team members.
translations.ja: チームメンバー全員と効果的にコミュニケーションをとることは重要です。

english: Always try to see things from a positive point of view.

translations.en: Always try to see things from a positive point of view.
translations.ja: 常に肯定的な視点から物事を見るようにしてください。

english: Honesty is vital for building a healthy and strong human relationship every day.

translations.en: Honesty is vital for building a healthy and strong human relationship every day.
translations.ja: 誠実さは、日々健全で強固な人間関係を築くために不可欠です。

english: The faster we finish our work, the sooner we can rest.

translations.en: The faster we finish our work, the sooner we can rest.
translations.ja: 仕事を早く終わらせれば、それだけ早く休むことができます。

english: Innovation is the key to creating a wonderful future for the next generation.

translations.en: Innovation is the key to creating a wonderful future for the next generation.
translations.ja: 革新は、次世代のためにより良い未来を創造するための鍵です。

english: We should evaluate the risks before starting this important school project.

translations.en: We should evaluate the risks before starting this important school project.
translations.ja: この重要な学校のプロジェクトを始める前に、リスクを評価すべきです。

english: Modern technology makes our lives much easier than they were before.

translations.en: Modern technology makes our lives much easier than they were before.
translations.ja: 現代のテクノロジーは、私たちの生活を以前よりもずっと楽にします。

english: Knowledge is the most powerful tool for human growth and discovery.

translations.en: Knowledge is the most powerful tool for human growth and discovery.
translations.ja: 知識は、人間の成長と発見のための最も強力な道具です。

english: It is necessary to stay focused on your specific and important task.

translations.en: It is necessary to stay focused on your specific and important task.
translations.ja: 自分の特定の重要なタスクに集中し続ける必要があります。

english: Health is a very valuable asset for every single person in this world.

translations.en: Health is a very valuable asset for every single person in this world.
translations.ja: 健康は、この世界のすべての人にとって非常に貴重な財産です。

english: Every action has a natural and direct reaction in the physical world today.

translations.en: Every action has a natural and direct reaction in the physical world today.
translations.ja: 今日の物理的な世界において、すべての行動には自然で直接的な反応があります。

english: I am convinced that we can achieve our goal if we work together.

translations.en: I am convinced that we can achieve our goal if we work together.
translations.ja: 協力すれば目標を達成できると確信しています。

english: Consider all the possible risks before you start your new plan today.

translations.en: Consider all the possible risks before you start your new plan today.
translations.ja: 今日、新しい計画を始める前に、考えられるすべてのリスクを考慮してください。

english: History shows that change is necessary for our growth and better life.

translations.en: History shows that change is necessary for our growth and better life.
translations.ja: 歴史は、私たちの成長とより良い生活には変化が必要であることを示しています。

english: The simple solution is often the best way forward in difficult times.

translations.en: The simple solution is often the best way forward in difficult times.
translations.ja: 困難な時期には、単純な解決策がしばしば最善の前進方法となります。

english: Think about the right answer before you speak out your opinion clearly.

translations.en: Think about the right answer before you speak out your opinion clearly.
translations.ja: 自分の意見をはっきり述べる前に、正しい答えについて考えてください。

english: I have already finished all my school homework for today.

translations.en: I have already finished all my school homework for today.
translations.ja: 私は今日の学校の宿題をすでにすべて終えました。

english: She has visited the local museum with her friends many times.

translations.en: She has visited the local museum with her friends many times.
translations.ja: 彼女は友達と何度も地元の博物館を訪れたことがあります。

english: The science book which is on the desk belongs to me.

translations.en: The science book which is on the desk belongs to me.
translations.ja: 机の上にある理科の本は私のものです。

english: This letter was written by my dear father ten years ago.

translations.en: This letter was written by my dear father ten years ago.
translations.ja: この手紙は10年前に大好きな父によって書かれました。

english: I want to know where she lives now with her family.

translations.en: I want to know where she lives now with her family.
translations.ja: 彼女が今家族とどこに住んでいるのか知りたいです。

english: He has lived in this small city for more than years.

translations.en: He has lived in this small city for more than years.
translations.ja: 彼はこの小さな街に何年も住んでいます。

english: The girl who is playing the piano is my younger sister.

translations.en: The girl who is playing the piano is my younger sister.
translations.ja: ピアノを弾いている女の子は私の妹です。

english: I am very glad to hear the good news today morning.

translations.en: I am very glad to hear the good news today morning.
translations.ja: 今朝、その良い知らせを聞いてとても嬉しいです。

english: This movie is much more interesting than that old one.

translations.en: This movie is much more interesting than that old one.
translations.ja: この映画はあの古いものよりもずっと面白いです。

english: He told me that he wanted to buy a new camera.

translations.en: He told me that he wanted to buy a new camera.
translations.ja: 彼は新しいカメラを買いたいと言いました。

english: Have you ever seen a white bird before now in Japan?

translations.en: Have you ever seen a white bird before now in Japan?
translations.ja: 今までに日本で白い鳥を見たことがありますか？

english: The room must be cleaned by the students after school.

translations.en: The room must be cleaned by the students after school.
translations.ja: 放課後、生徒たちによって部屋が掃除されなければなりません。

english: I do not know how to use this new computer yet.

translations.en: I do not know how to use this new computer yet.
translations.ja: この新しいコンピュータの使い方はまだわかりません。

english: She is the best English teacher in our small school.

translations.en: She is the best English teacher in our small school.
translations.ja: 彼女は私たちの小さな学校で最高の英語の先生です。

english: He was watching TV when I called him this evening.

translations.en: He was watching TV when I called him this evening.
translations.ja: 今晩、私が彼に電話したとき、彼はテレビを見ていました。

english: I have to finish my school project by tomorrow evening.

translations.en: I have to finish my school project by tomorrow evening.
translations.ja: 明日の晩までに学校のプロジェクトを終わらせなければなりません。

english: This is the hospital where my mother works every day.

translations.en: This is the hospital where my mother works every day.
translations.ja: ここが、私の母が毎日働いている病院です。

english: He has already finished his big breakfast today now morning.

translations.en: He has already finished his big breakfast today now morning.
translations.ja: 彼は今朝、すでにボリュームのある朝食を終えました。

english: I am not sure if I can go there alone.

translations.en: I am not sure if I can go there alone.
translations.ja: 一人でそこに行けるかどうかわかりません。

english: The funny story which he told us was very great.

translations.en: The funny story which he told us was very great.
translations.ja: 彼が話してくれた面白いお話はとても素晴らしかったです。

english: She is the girl who speaks English very well today.

translations.en: She is the girl who speaks English very well today.
translations.ja: 彼女は今日、英語をとても上手に話す女の子です。

english: You should not be late for the school class today.

translations.en: You should not be late for the school class today.
translations.ja: 今日の学校の授業に遅れてはいけません。

english: My brother has been sick for two days at home.

translations.en: My brother has been sick for two days at home.
translations.ja: 兄は家で2日間病気で寝込んでいます。

english: I think that this is the best way to study.

translations.en: I think that this is the best way to study.
translations.ja: これが一番良い学習方法だと思います。

english: I can play the piano very well now after school.

translations.en: I can play the piano very well now after school.
translations.ja: 放課後、ピアノをとても上手に弾けるようになりました。
